leadText: The Berry Pouch (Japanese: きのみぶくろ Berry Sack) is a Key Item introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Berry Pouch holds the Berries the player collects in place of the Berries pocket introduced in Pokémon Ruby and Sapphire . In Generation V , the bag pockets are referred to as "cases", and are depicted in-game as a series of different containers, one of which includes a separate pouch for Berries, perhaps alluding to the Berry Pouch from Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method FR LG Automatically obtained when the player obtains their first Berry, the earliest without trading being Route 3 .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description FR LG A pouch for carrying Berries . It is attached to the Bag 's compartment for important items. E A convenient container that holds Berries .
